subject: feat(quality): set up ESLint + Vitest, write 38 unit tests, update docs
body:
ESLint:
- Install eslint 9, typescript-eslint 8, react-hooks 5, react-refresh
- Create flat config (eslint.config.mjs) with TypeScript + React rules
- Fix 4 violations: conditional useMemo in FieldPropertiesPanel (moved
  above early return), unused catch var in PublicFormPage, misplaced
  eslint-disable in usePWAInstall
- Add npm run lint script

Vitest:
- Install vitest 4, @testing-library/react, jsdom
- Configure in vite.config.ts (test block with jsdom environment)
- Write 15 validation tests: isFieldEmpty edge cases, validateField for
  text/email/phone/number/rating/heading/hidden
- Write 14 condition tests: all 8 operators, AND/OR logic, show/hide
  actions, empty group handling
- Write 9 CSV export tests: formatValue conversions, escapeCsvField
  formula injection prevention (CWE-1236)
- Add npm test and npm run test:watch scripts

Documentation:
- USER_GUIDE.md: add form list visual cues, embed sandbox, confirmations
- TESTING_GUIDE.md: add 4 scenarios (confirm dialogs, transitions,
  header, unit tests) + 6 regression checklist items
- TODO.md: mark ESLint/Vitest as done, consolidate doc items
- HISTORY.md: add quality setup entry
- SESSION_NOTES.md: fresh session summary

Tags: quality, testing, linting, documentation
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: ui-polish
Semver: minor
